creator: trh411@gmail.com
text:
audio/ampache fails to install, even though portmaster reports the installation completed. There is no /usr/local/www/ampache path, which is where ampache is installed.

Fix: 

As a workaround, place "NO_STAGE=yes" in the Makefile. I know this only masks the problem and is not a real fix, but I do not know enough about staging to provide an fix. Sorry.
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to install audio/ampache
